<td id="Card11472788" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href11472788" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACC236AXPANFDCFGOVHD5LSU7D2NFPOX2QTBYZVG2W3VMBVUHXK7E2HDLBBISXIW4FZFVS2R4AAXGSI233FQ3NSE5B6Z2HCMBJISJWCVFA2HQLJ4NZOIDEZ6ZZPDXZXJLPTA6MHG4PQQHTQYODIBTTVEGPSIMSYKH3THQICTVHCD3HSWEQPKETIPND5WXKUYCDDD556DRZ7EKFCBOQKC5MKOBYRDLB6LQ5ELHWQPHTYJJNCMOV2WAL47PCVBHAV4IXO74RCM36DFRNLKXZHZO7KDQTWY&d=AIAADEI3ARRASBBWLBA6MHKIYOKDENB52BJGIA56TAB2NKSS4GLCTUX6FNPD5SE6QGJHBIGZF3U4P7LD4JE75AASI3RAMNU32KJL6WLJB5XA7G5TUFY7WUW2FEDE3MMMXLVFURGX3M256HJVLRGR7DHGN42KFMZQWS2TJUZDHE624ATCJCM6JHPW&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title11472788" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href11472788" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACEL7IDSQF5OZWGLPFOS5MFDNJ7326ULMORIIQYUEVFCTA56ODYLGOCCVZBHKJLFGKTQBBWBQ7G5RVRSQUAYA3IWPDPI7OTYJZOJAB6VVG6SWOYJFFQRRSAPUYQUCYGPYOLMWEWFARRZPV64KXKJO7R3QZQHGPG7Q5U7JO6DTSU2B5MQSVGGI554GDIMTJQJUZHTWOKITGGAXKMXYNQMQ7QLOOFXM4G2QR3HBJPABLMIAVQHPOQUSGJZG2DPTMX4ZMVMSTQPSTAYGLTUEQ2VT22HEJZQ&d=AIAADUBBOUBAY3TYZ2WKHKSJFOZQRXLMAL5USMU526OGG5QTJO6YBCJB7XHOSLXFYUSOIFU5I4ILX43YN43YJOV2CGO7MEH3LBLB7M3HSFSDZPUKDRLFIT3E2JV5AEZDTGGDMQ2BXRS3GH3MGCAWKB4HD655HRXJDOURYF7UZZW4ABJNMB3DYMMU&" target="_blank">
                        Putin's £40,000,000 bomber shot down in deadly ambush
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>

                                        Metro

    </table>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">

</tr>
